_note: Snapshot of public.contracts taken 2026-04-20 just before migration 003 TRUNCATE. Use yaml_content of any row you want to re-import via the dashboard/API after migrations 003-005 apply. Event-row tables (audit_log, quarantine_events, forwarded_events) are NOT backed up — they're disposable test traffic.

contracts.name: user_events_test
contracts.yaml_content:
version: "1.0"
name: "user_events_test"
description: "Smoke-test contract"

ontology:
  entities:
    - name: user_id
      type: string
      required: true
      pattern: "^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$"
    - name: event_type
      type: string
      required: true
      enum: ["click", "view", "purchase", "login"]
    - name: timestamp
      type: integer
      required: true
      min: 0
    - name: amount
      type: number
      required: false
      min: 0

glossary:
  - field: amount
    description: "Monetary amount in USD"
    constraints: "must be non-negative"

metrics:
  - name: total_revenue
    formula: "sum(amount) where event_type = 'purchase'"

contracts.name: demo_sales
contracts.yaml_content:
version: "1.0"
name: "demo_sales"
ontology:
  entities:
    - name: customer_id
      type: string
      required: true
    - name: revenue
      type: float
      required: true
      min: 0
    - name: event_type
      type: string
      required: true
    - name: timestamp
      type: integer
      required: true

contracts.name: my_contract
contracts._note: draft from today's PII-test session — has compliance_mode:true and mask on event_type
contracts.yaml_content:
version: "1.0"
name: "my_contract"
compliance_mode: true

ontology:
  entities:
    - name: user_id
      type: string
      required: true
      pattern: "^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{3,64}$"
    - name: event_type
      type: string
      required: true
      enum:
        - "click"
        - "view"
        - "purchase"
      transform:
        kind: mask
    - name: timestamp
      type: integer
      required: true
      min: 0

glossary:
  - field: "user_id"
    description: "Unique user identifier"
  - field: "event_type"
    description: "Type of user interaction"
  - field: "timestamp"
    description: "Unix timestamp in seconds"

metrics: []
